headline: Raheem Sterling
body: Why do Chelsea want to sign Lacroix from Palace?. Chelsea have not paid a transfer fee for a player aged 26 or over since the summer of 2022 with the ill-fated acquisitions of Raheem Sterling and Kalidou Koulibaly. But Crystal Palace&8217;s Maxence Lacroix is a player worth relaxing the policy for.
